name: pi-extensions
description: Collection of extensions and themes for Pi Coding Agent
author: luongnv89

scripts.install-all: cp -r extensions/* ~/.pi/agent/extensions/ && cp -r themes/* ~/.pi/agent/themes/ && echo 'Installation complete. Please reload Pi.'
scripts.install-extensions: cp -r extensions/* ~/.pi/agent/extensions/ && echo 'Extensions installed. Please reload Pi.'
scripts.install-themes: cp -r themes/* ~/.pi/agent/themes/ && echo 'Themes installed. Please reload Pi.'
